description_long: This is a yellow American football helmet featuring a prominent maroon stripe running from the front to the back along the crown. The helmet displays the letters 'CUC' and a maroon cougar head logo on both sides. The facemask is maroon and constructed from a sturdy metal, providing facial protection and visibility. Multiple triangular and oval-shaped ventilation holes are distributed along the sides and top for airflow. The helmet includes a chin strap and internal padding, likely made from foam, for comfort and secure fit. The overall design is sleek and professional, suitable for use in competitive sports or urban recreational leagues.
description: A yellow football helmet with a maroon stripe, cougar logo, and maroon facemask, featuring multiple vents and a chin strap.
description_view_0: Left-rear view showing the maroon stripe, CUC cougar logo, and several side and rear ventilation holes.
description_view_1: Front-left view highlighting the facemask, chin strap, and the start of the maroon stripe with the CUC logo visible.
description_view_2: Front-right view focusing on the facemask, visor area, and the CUC logo with the maroon stripe running over the top.
description_view_3: Right-rear view displaying the maroon stripe, CUC cougar logo, and rear ventilation holes.
attribute_brand_logo: A maroon cougar head logo with the letters 'CUC' above it, located on both sides of the helmet.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Six triangular and oval-shaped vents distributed symmetrically on the sides and top of the helmet.
attribute_graphic_design: Yellow base with a single maroon stripe running front to back, maroon CUC cougar logo and text on both sides.
